summary: Both options involve partial involvement but only the Maxillary Division of Trigeminal Nerve has significant contribution while other nerves serve different functions not related directly to the palate’s sense perception tasks as clearly defined by their anatomical distribution patterns across various regions including face, mouth etc., making it evident that all mentioned here apart from
